fields.description:
Undesigned parking-lot capture of the 7 recommendations in docs/research/task-decomposition-sota-2026.md section 6 (commit 143d5074e): R1 asserted-capability grounding probe (pass 1, G6/E4 rubric); R2 operator-attested evidence-kind lint (pass 1 DET, P6); R3 decomposition-shape container criterion (pass 1); R4 necessity/no-op gate + lightweight bug review tier (pass 1); R5 asserted_capability_confirmed sub-answer via agentic verifier for G6/E4/T3 cohorts (pass 2); R6 advisory-triage coaching move (pass 4); R7 gate-eval instrumentation extending docs/experiments/plan-review-gate (cross-cutting). Each carries a falsifiable experiment + FP assessment in the report. Priority order: R7, R2, R1+R5, R6, R4, R3. Promote to open per-recommendation after design.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Each promoted recommendation gets its own designed ticket with the report's experiment as its verification plan.
